title: senecio pinnulatus
intro: Senecio pinnulatus, also known as Ragwort, is a perennial plant with fern-like leaves and small yellow flowers. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The plant has been linked to various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing pain and fever, and supporting digestion. Senecio pinnulatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and has also been used in traditional medicine as a poultice or topical application.
